Kentrophyllum coeruleum is native to New Caledonia, an island country in the Pacific Ocean. The classification of Kentrophyllum coeruleum places it within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Angiospermophyta. It is also known as Staphidia coerulea or Kentrophyllum staphidioides.
